g.text: Work-Stealing: Load Balancing Under Skewed Workloads

div.p: ✓ Load balanced in O(log P) steal rounds ✓ Idle threads self-activate ✓ No central coordinator needed
✓ Theoretical bound: O(T₁/P + T∞) ✓ Critical path (T∞) limits parallelism ✓ Idle threads help finish stragglers
⚠ Work-stealing helps within each role ⚠ Cross-role balance requires channel capacity tuning ✓ Backpressure prevents producer overflow
